name: In West Valley City, how long for ladder fall comp settlement?

mainEntity.name: In West Valley City, how long for ladder fall comp settlement?

acceptedAnswer.description:
Utah settlements average 6-18 months; faster for clear cases, longer with disputes.[1]

Local factors like state fund speed process.[2]

- Simple: 3-6 months.
- Litigated: 1-2 years.
- Appeal adds time.

Hire experienced counsel for efficiency.[3]
